title: Bunji 4k
description: A Light Blue Themed PvP Texturepack made for the Youtuber Bunji
body: This is a texturepack made for a youtuber named [Bunji](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCc7z8FSm9zmRe6BkLMoZA3A) for his 4k subs on youtube. This 1.21 PvP texturepack features a light blue theme on most crystal PvP related items and gui alongside a lot of quality of life features like invisible explosion particles and a lot of nice animations. ### Everything changed - Short Retextured Swords - Iron, Diamond and Netherite Armor - Diamond Set, Blocks and Ores - Various PvP-Related Items like Ender Pearls, Exp Bottles, Wind Charges, Golden Apples - Mace, Trident, End Crystals and Anchors - Enchant Glint and Enchanting Table - GUI and HUD - Animated Totem of Undying, Fireworks, Potions and Tipped Arrows - Invisible Explosion Particles, Block Breaking Particles, Eating Particles and Smaller Totems - No Explosion Sounds
